languages.text: Древние врата явно некогда были запечатаны и замурованы с применением нечеловеческих технологий.
The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.
languages.original_text: Древние врата явно некогда были запечатаны и замурованы с применением нечеловеческих технологий.

traits.locale_text: The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.
The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.

languages.text: この古代の門は、明らかに非人間的な技術によって封印され、壁で塞がれていた。
languages.original_text: The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.

traits.locale_text: この古代の門は、明らかに非人間的な技術によって封印され、壁で塞がれていた。

languages.text: Kadim kapı, belli ki bir zamanlar insanlık dışı bir teknolojiyle mühürlenmiş ve örülmüş.
languages.original_text: The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.

traits.locale_text: Kadim kapı, belli ki bir zamanlar insanlık dışı bir teknolojiyle mühürlenmiş ve örülmüş.

languages.text: Es evidente que la antiquísima puerta estuvo una vez sellada a cal y canto mediante una tecnología que no es humana.
languages.original_text: The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.

traits.locale_text: Es evidente que la antiquísima puerta estuvo una vez sellada a cal y canto mediante una tecnología que no es humana.

languages.text: 这道古老的大门显然曾被非人类技术封死并围筑隐藏起来。
languages.original_text: The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.

traits.locale_text: 这道古老的大门显然曾被非人类技术封死并围筑隐藏起来。

languages.text: L'ancienne porte a été condamnée et murée par des moyens technologiques non-humains.
languages.original_text: The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.

traits.locale_text: L'ancienne porte a été condamnée et murée par des moyens technologiques non-humains.

languages.text: Das alte Tor war einst versiegelt und mittels unmenschlicher Technologien zugemauert worden.
languages.original_text: The ancient gate was clearly once sealed and walled up by means of inhuman technology.
